query:
SELECT
            s.name,
            sl.open as "open: bool",
            sl.created_at as "last_fetched: DateTime"
        FROM space s
        LEFT JOIN space_log sl ON sl.space_log_id = (
            SELECT space_log_id FROM space_log
            WHERE space_id = s.space_id
            ORDER BY created_at DESC
            LIMIT 1
        )
        WHERE s.active = TRUE
